companyNameJapanese: 日月光投資控股股份有限公司
description: World's largest OSAT (Outsourced Semiconductor Assembly and Test) company. Provides semiconductor packaging, interconnect materials, front-end engineering testing, wafer probing, and final testing services. Formed in 2018 by combining ASE Group, Siliconware Precision Industries, and Universal Scientific Industrial.

_externalRelationships.notes: World #1 OSAT with ~30% global market share. HQ in Kaohsiung, Taiwan. NYSE ADR: ASX. Major buyer of dicing and probing equipment from ACCRETECH and DISCO. Also received Hanmi Semiconductor flip chip bonders.

_metadata.dataSource: Yahoo Finance, Seeking Alpha, SEMI, TrendForce
